title: Capability Map
description: Map abstract capability slugs (e.g. interactive-game, payments, analytics) to candidate Dossier IDs. The planningModel reads this when a Site Brief lists requestedCapabilities so it knows which Dossiers are even candidates before running embedding + rerank. Locked by ADR 0013 as a Sprint 2B prerequisite.

dossiers.description: Dossier IDs that satisfy this capability. Empty list = capability is recognised but no Dossier exists yet (codegen must surface this to the operator).

default.description: Default Dossier ID for this capability when planningModel has no other signal. Must be one of dossiers.

comment.description: Operator-facing note (e.g. 'No Dossier yet; resend-contact-form planned for Sprint 3').
